mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id FROM posts p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.like_count <> ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.post_id ) ORDER BY p.post_id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT c.comment_id FROM comments c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.like_count <> ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_likes cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.comment_id ) ORDER BY c.comment_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.user_id FROM users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.follower_count <> ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf JOIN users follower ON follower.user_id = uf.follower WHERE uf.followee = u.user_id AND follower.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY u.user_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.user_id FROM users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.followee_count <> ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf JOIN users followee ON followee.user_id = uf.followee WHERE uf.follower = u.user_id AND followee.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY u.user_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT g.group_id FROM user_groups g WHERE g.deleted_at IS NULL AND g.member_count <> ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_members gm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = g.group_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY g.group_id LIMIT #{limit}
